items.title_en: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Meta, General Mills, Datadog, Sandisk & more
items.title_zh: 中午涨幅最大的股票：Meta、General Mills、Datadog、Sandisk 等
items.desc_en: These are the stocks posting the largest moves midday.
items.desc_zh: 这些是午盘涨幅最大的股票。

items.title_en: Inflation peaked in May as energy prices fell in June, Kalshi traders think
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员认为，随着能源价格在 6 月份下跌，通胀在 5 月份达到顶峰
items.desc_en: Speculators on the prediction market platform give less than 30% odds to inflation peaking above 4.2% in 2026.
items.desc_zh: 预测市场平台上的投机者认为，2026 年通胀率达到 4.2% 以上峰值的可能性不到 30%。

items.title_en: Controversial bishops ordained as Pope warns of 'schism' in Catholic Church
items.title_zh: 教皇警告天主教会“分裂”，任命备受争议的主教
items.desc_en: Thousands of worshippers attended a ceremony in the Swiss Alps as part of the breakaway Society of Saint Pius X.
items.desc_zh: 作为脱离圣庇护十世协会的一部分，数千名信徒参加了在瑞士阿尔卑斯山举行的仪式。

items.title_en: 'Magnificent 7' stocks' rough June pushes them into the red for the year. What's behind the decline
items.title_zh: “Magnificent 7”股票在六月的艰难处境使它们今年陷入亏损。下降的背后是什么
items.desc_en: The group — which Microsoft, Nvidia, Alphabet, Apple, Meta, Tesla and Amazon — shaved off roughly $2 trillion in market cap during June.
items.desc_zh: 该集团（包括微软、英伟达、Alphabet、苹果、Meta、特斯拉和亚马逊）在 6 月份市值蒸发了约 2 万亿美元。

items.title_en: 'Time for him to pay' - Carroll calls on Trump to pay $5m after president's appeal fails
items.title_zh: “他该付出代价了”——卡罗尔呼吁特朗普在总统上诉失败后支付 500 万美元
items.desc_en: The writer's lawyers say Trump wants to delay paying the damages awarded by a jury that found the president liable for sexually abusing and defaming her.
items.desc_zh: 这位作家的律师表示，特朗普希望推迟支付陪审团裁定的损害赔偿金，该陪审团裁定总统对她的性虐待和诽谤负有责任。

items.title_en: Trump administration's limits on student loan forgiveness program are blocked. What to know
items.title_zh: 特朗普政府对学生贷款减免计划的限制被阻止。要知道什么
items.desc_en: Trump's policy that narrowed eligibility for a popular student loan forgiveness program will not go into effect, after two federal judges blocked the rule.
items.desc_zh: 在两名联邦法官阻止该规则后，特朗普缩小受欢迎的学生贷款减免计划资格的政策将不会生效。

items.title_en: GM reports 4.2% decline in Q2 U.S. sales as EV demand falls
items.title_zh: 通用汽车报告称，由于电动汽车需求下降，第二季度美国销量下降 4.2%
items.desc_en: General Motors' second-quarter U.S. sales fell 4.2% as year-over-year demand for its all-electric vehicles and Chevrolet Silverado pickup trucks declined.
items.desc_zh: 通用汽车第二季度美国销量下降 4.2%，原因是其全电动汽车和雪佛兰索罗德皮卡车的需求同比下降。

items.title_en: Man guilty of attempted murder of three children in Dublin
items.title_zh: 都柏林男子企图谋杀三名儿童
items.desc_en: Riad Bouchaker denied attempting to murder three children and assaulting four other people on 23 November 2023.
items.desc_zh: Riad Bouchaker 否认于 2023 年 11 月 23 日企图谋杀三名儿童并袭击另外四人。

items.title_en: Trump says outside funds 'run my money' after disclosure shows billions in 2025 revenue

items.desc_zh: 总统从房地产、特朗普主题的圣经、手表和其他物品中赚取了数百万美元。

items.title_en: Anthropic says US lifts export ban on its advanced AI tools
items.title_zh: Anthropic 称美国取消对其先进人工智能工具的出口禁令
items.desc_en: Fable and Mythos were abruptly suspended in June over concerns that they could be used by hackers.
items.desc_zh: 由于担心黑客可能利用《寓言》和《神话》，它们在 6 月份突然被暂停。

items.title_en: Afghan Taliban launch strikes on border with Pakistan as tensions escalate
items.title_zh: 随着紧张局势升级，阿富汗塔利班对与巴基斯坦边境发动袭击
items.desc_en: Pakistan's military says it shot down four rudimentary drones and will respond to any further provocation.
items.desc_zh: 巴基斯坦军方表示，他们击落了四架简陋的无人机，并将对任何进一步的挑衅做出回应。

items.title_en: US envoys in Doha to meet mediators but not Iranians, Qatar says
items.title_zh: 卡塔尔表示，美国驻多哈特使将与调解人会面，但不会与伊朗人会面
items.desc_en: Qatar's foreign ministry spokesman says no high-level meetings or direct talks between the US and Iran are scheduled.
items.desc_zh: 卡塔尔外交部发言人表示，美国和伊朗之间没有安排高层会议或直接会谈。

items.title_en: A plane crashed into a tower in Beijing but China is not saying what happened
items.title_zh: 一架飞机撞上北京的一座塔楼，但中国没有透露发生了什么
items.desc_en: The collision left holes on the side of the tower, but Beijing has scrubbed other visible traces of the incident.
items.desc_zh: 碰撞在塔的一侧留下了洞，但北京已经清除了该事件的其他明显痕迹。

items.title_en: E-scooters being advertised for commuting despite UK road ban
items.title_zh: 尽管英国道路禁令，电动滑板车仍在做通勤广告
items.desc_en: A Press Association investigation found major retailers advertising e-scooters for "commuting" and "urban riding".
items.desc_zh: 新闻协会的一项调查发现，主要零售商为“通勤”和“城市骑行”的电动滑板车做广告。

items.title_en: Three-year-old rescued and taken to hospital six days after Venezuela quake
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震六天后，三岁儿童获救并送往医院
items.desc_en: Video footage shows rescuers cheering as the child is pulled from rubble in La Guaira state.
items.desc_zh: 视频片段显示，当孩子从拉瓜伊拉州的废墟中被救出时，救援人员欢呼雀跃。

items.title_en: Tech Life
items.title_zh: 科技生活
items.desc_en: We hear concerns that shadow banning is limiting access to health advice for women.
items.desc_zh: 我们听到有人担心影子禁令限制了女性获得健康建议的机会。

items.title_en: US Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship in blow to Trump
items.title_zh: 美国最高法院维持与生俱来的公民身份，对特朗普造成打击
items.desc_en: The ruling is a major setback for Donald Trump's immigration agenda, and has been welcomed by civil rights groups.
items.desc_zh: 这项裁决是唐纳德·特朗普移民议程的重大挫折，并受到民权组织的欢迎。

items.title_en: Roof collapse kills 14 schoolchildren in Pakistan
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦屋顶倒塌造成14名学童死亡
items.desc_en: Two people are taken into custody after the incident at a tuition centre in the Kahna suburb of Lahore.
items.desc_zh: 事件发生后，拉合尔卡纳郊区的一个补习中心有两人被拘留。

items.title_en: Ford rehires human engineers after AI fails to match quality checks
items.title_zh: 人工智能未能匹配质量检查后，福特重新雇用人类工程师
items.desc_en: The car-maker found AI quality checks failed to match the skill of veteran technicians.
items.desc_zh: 该汽车制造商发现人工智能质量检查无法与经验丰富的技术人员的技能相匹配。

items.title_en: Tech firms are blaming AI for mega device and console price rises
items.title_zh: 科技公司将大型设备和游戏机价格上涨归咎于人工智能
items.desc_en: Xbox consoles, Nintendo's new Switch 2 and Valve's Steam Deck are just some of the gadgets seeing price hikes in recent months.
items.desc_zh: Xbox 游戏机、任天堂的新 Switch 2 和 Valve 的 Steam Deck 只是近几个月价格上涨的一些小玩意。

items.title_en: Why GTA 6 will launch without a disc - and what it means for gamers

items.desc_en: Music and films are now largely digital-only - does the lack of a disc for GTA 6 mean gaming is going the same way?
items.desc_zh: 音乐和电影现在基本上都是数字化的——《GTA 6》缺少光盘是否意味着游戏也会走同样的路？

items.title_en: Teens who hacked TfL were known to police years before cyber-attack
items.title_zh: 警方在网络攻击发生前几年就知道黑客入侵伦敦交通局的青少年
items.desc_en: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair were convicted for their roles in the attack, which led to large costs for Transport for London.
items.desc_zh: 欧文·弗劳尔斯（Owen Flowers）和塔哈·朱贝尔（Thalha Jubair）因参与袭击而被定罪，这给伦敦交通局带来了巨额损失。

items.title_en: Apple hikes MacBook and iPad prices, blaming rising chip costs
items.title_zh: 苹果提高MacBook和iPad价格，归咎于芯片成本上涨
items.desc_en: Apple said it had "never seen a component price increase this much, this quickly".
items.desc_zh: 苹果表示，“从未见过零部件价格上涨如此之快”。

items.title_en: IBM hails new 'block of flats' design breakthrough for ultra tiny chips
items.title_zh: IBM 欢呼超微型芯片的新“公寓”设计突破
items.desc_en: IBM says it has created the world's first known chip tech below 1 nanometre - but it will be some time before it's ready for production.
items.desc_zh: IBM 表示，它已经创造了世界上第一个已知的 1 纳米以下的芯片技术，但距离投入生产还需要一段时间。
